mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET status = 'RETURNED', return_date = #{returnDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT br.*, u.name as user_name, b.title as book_title FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN user u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
SELECT br.*, u.name as user_name, b.title as book_title FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN user u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
